text.title: LLM Cost-Quality-Latency Tradeoff Framework Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid LLM Cost-Quality-Latency Tradeoff Framework output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: chosen_config not on Pareto front (dominated by another)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: workflow_id populated with a typed value
eval_set populated with a typed value
pareto_candidates populated with a typed value
chosen_config populated with a typed value
drift_alarm populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
